title: SAP MCP Hosted Setup
description: SAP MCP is hosted and non-custodial. Free/read tools work remotely; paid or write tools require a local SAP profile and sap_payments bridge created by the wizard.

setupMode.title: Setup mode
setupMode.description: Choose hosted-read for discovery only, or hosted-paid-local-bridge to use x402/pay.sh paid and write tools with local signing.

wizardCompleted.title: Wizard completed
wizardCompleted.description: Set true after running: npm exec --yes --package @oobe-protocol-labs/sap-mcp-server -- sap-mcp-config wizard

maxUsdPerPaidCall.title: Max USD per paid call
maxUsdPerPaidCall.description: Recommended local policy cap for x402/pay.sh hosted paid tool calls. Enforced by the local sap_payments bridge, not by Smithery.

autoPayMicropayments.title: Auto-pay small calls
autoPayMicropayments.description: Optional local bridge behavior for tiny approved calls. OOBE hosted MCP never stores user keypairs, wallet bytes, or signer secrets.
